title: Deep Learning Intro
description: Learn deep learning basics and boost your AI skills. Discover neural networks and more.

title: Backpropagation Demystified: Chain Rule in Practice
description: Implement backpropagation from scratch with NumPy. Understand the chain rule across computation graphs and see exactly how neural networks learn.

title: The Transformer Architecture: Self-Attention Explained from Scratch
description: A deep technical walkthrough of the Transformer — from scaled dot-product attention to multi-head attention and positional encodings.
